name: BILIARY-ENTERIC FISTULA

demographics.Etiology: cholelithiasis (90%), acute / chronic cholecystitis, biliary tract carcinoma, regional

discriminating_features: pneumobilia = branching tubular radiolucencies, more prominent centrally within the liver
shrunken gallbladder mimicking pseudodiverticulum of duodenal bulb
multiple hyperechoic foci with dirty shadowing

general: pneumobilia = branching tubular radiolucencies, more prominent centrally within the liver
shrunken gallbladder mimicking pseudodiverticulum of duodenal bulb
multiple hyperechoic foci with dirty shadowing
